native_unittest.skip_reason: The system Python does not provide PySide6; the isolated native environment is required for the Qt UI smoke test.

builder_regression.notes: All Builder regression checks passed outside the restricted process sandbox.

manual_fceux_v63.attestation: The product owner reports that the C and ASM files passed all relevant attended tests checked at the time.
manual_fceux_v63.limitations: The earlier manual run did not leave a case-by-case command, input-sequence, screenshot, or observation manifest. Current automated v63 coverage therefore remains the reproducible evidence; the attestation closes the attended gate without fabricating missing observations.
automated_v63_support: asm-corpus.mjs: 14 project shapes rendered equivalently at rest
asm-player.mjs: platformer, top-down, SMB, runner, racer, and two-player matched-state checks
asm-realproj.mjs: scrolling composite with moving player and four enemy AI types
asm-play.mjs: raw ASM compile and link path
